ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the model */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was uploaded */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used */,
  "dataset" TEXT /* Dataset used for training and evaluation */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used */,
  "model_path" TEXT /* Path to the model file */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the model is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the test set */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "test_size" REAL /* Proportion of the dataset used for testing */,
  "train_size" REAL /* Proportion of the dataset used for training */,
  "fold_count" INTEGER /* Number of folds used in cross-validation */,
  "train_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy on the training set */,
  "train_f1_score" REAL /* F1 score on the training set */,
  "train_precision" REAL /* Precision on the training set */,
  "train_recall" REAL /* Recall on the training set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fairness_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fairness metric record */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation this metric belongs to */,
  "avg_abs_odds_diff" REAL /* Average absolute odds difference for race */,
  "balanced_acc" REAL /* Balanced accuracy across groups */,
  "theil_index" REAL /* Theil index indicating inequality */,
  "disparate_impact" REAL /* Measure of disparate impact across groups */,
  "demographic_parity_diff" REAL /* Difference in demographic parity */,
  "equal_opportunity_diff" REAL /* Difference in equal opportunity */,
  "group_coefficient_of_variation" REAL /* Coefficient of variation across groups */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fairness_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation this log entry corresponds to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., 'created', 'updated') */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user performing the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "model_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first model in the comparison */,
  "model_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second model in the comparison */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date the comparison was made */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., accuracy, fairness) */,
  "result" TEXT /* JSON field to store the comparison result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_2") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_1") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Git commit hash of the model version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the latest version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
